summary.intent: The user wanted to understand the difference between Claude thinking mode and plan mode, then investigated why thinking blocks were no longer visible in recent sessions.
summary.outcome: Conceptual distinction was clarified. Root cause of missing thinking content was identified: recent sessions contain thinking blocks with 0-byte (redacted/encrypted) content, likely due to a Claude CLI update or accidental config change rather than a bug in the application.

repo: The app indexes Claude session JSONL files and stores thinking blocks in a DB; the pipeline correctly writes blocks even when content is empty/redacted.
Thinking blocks with type 'thinking' but empty 'thinking' field indicate redacted/encrypted thinking from the model, not a missing indexer step.

code.finding: Modified as part of thinking block display investigation

Modified as part of thinking block display investigation

workflow: Plan Mode (Claude Code) and Thinking Mode (model capability) are orthogonal: Plan Mode restricts edits and enforces review workflow; Thinking Mode controls whether the model emits visible chain-of-thought.
When Claude uses 'budget tokens' thinking or a model version change occurs, thinking content is returned as redacted blobs — the UI silently shows nothing since the field is empty.
Checking ~/.claude/settings.json or running 'claude config list' can reveal if thinking-related settings changed.

friction: Thinking blocks silently disappear from the UI when redacted — no error or indicator that thinking occurred but was hidden.
The user ran /config just before the issue surfaced, creating ambiguity about whether a setting was accidentally changed vs. a CLI update caused the regression.
open_items: Confirm root cause: determine whether a Claude CLI update or an accidental /config change triggered the switch to redacted thinking.
Consider adding UI indication when thinking blocks exist but are redacted, so the user knows thinking occurred rather than seeing nothing.
Audit ~/.claude/settings.json for any thinking/budget_tokens setting that may have been toggled.
